title: Ivan's All Caxton Typefaces You Can Use Buffet
description: Ivan's All Caxton Typefaces You Can Use Buffet is a modpack full of Ivan's Caxton Fontpacks
body:
Ivan's All Caxton Typefaces You Can Use Buffet is a Modpack full of Ivan's Caxton Font packs (+ Extra Performance Improving mods)

It Also includes quality improving mods as well as QoL mods (Quality of Life)

The Mod list can be found in a tab on the website that has documentation.

![Main Menu with Branding](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15d1cdba5be1c5decc9ec872152b2d313ce95296.jpeg)
